Americano.description: Smooth espresso blended with hot water for a clean, balanced finish.
Americano.Extended_Description: Smooth espresso blended with hot water, creating a clean, balanced cup with a mild yet rich flavor and a subtle aroma—perfect for a simple, no-frills coffee anytime.

Espresso.description: Rich, concentrated coffee with a bold flavor and velvety crema.
Espresso.Extended_Description: A bold and concentrated shot of finely brewed coffee, delivering a rich flavor with a strong aroma and a slightly bitter finish—perfect for a quick, intense coffee boost.

Macchiato.description: Bold espresso marked with a touch of milk for a refined finish.
Macchiato.Extended_Description: A bold espresso marked with a small amount of steamed milk, creating a rich, strong flavor with a slight creamy touch—perfect for those who want intensity with a hint of smoothness.

Matcha Latte.description: Creamy matcha and milk with a soft, earthy, and calming taste.
Matcha Latte.Extended_Description: A bold espresso marked with a small amount of steamed milk, creating a rich, strong flavor with a slight creamy touch—perfect for those who want intensity with a hint of smoothness.

Flat White.description: Velvety espresso with steamed milk for a smooth, balanced taste.
Flat White.Extended_Description: A smooth and velvety coffee made with rich espresso and finely steamed milk, creating a creamy texture with a balanced, less foamy finish—perfect for a rich yet mellow coffee experience.

Irish Coffee.description: Coffee with Irish whiskey and cream, smooth and warmly indulgent.
Irish Coffee.Extended_Description: A warm and rich coffee made with freshly brewed coffee, a touch of Irish whiskey, and lightly whipped cream, creating a smooth, slightly sweet drink with a comforting kick.

Lemon lime Iced Tea.description: A refreshing blend of citrusy lemon and zesty lime over chilled tea.
Lemon lime Iced Tea.Extended_Description: A refreshing blend of citrusy lemon and zesty lime infused into chilled tea, delivering a crisp, tangy flavor with a light sweetness—perfect for cooling down on a warm day.

Apple Iced tea.description: Chilled tea infused with sweet and crisp apple flavor.
Apple Iced tea.Extended_Description: Chilled tea infused with the naturally sweet and crisp flavor of apples, offering a smooth, fruity taste with a refreshing finish that’s both light and satisfying.

Mango smoothie.description: A creamy blend of ripe mangoes with a smooth, refreshing finish.
Mango smoothie.Extended_Description: A creamy blend of ripe, juicy mangoes perfectly pureed with ice and milk, creating a rich, tropical drink that’s sweet, refreshing, and irresistibly smooth.

Rosemary & Orange Iced Tea.description: A fragrant mix of citrus orange and herbal rosemary in chilled tea.
Rosemary & Orange Iced Tea.Extended_Description: A fragrant fusion of bright citrus orange and subtle herbal rosemary steeped in chilled tea, creating a unique, refreshing drink with a balanced sweet and aromatic profile.

Iced Mocha.description: Rich espresso blended with chocolate and milk over ice.
Iced Mocha.Extended_Description: Rich espresso combined with smooth chocolate and creamy milk, served over ice for a perfectly balanced drink with bold coffee notes and a sweet, indulgent finish.

Blueberry & mint Iced tea.description: Fruity blueberry and cool mint blended into refreshing iced tea.
Blueberry & mint Iced tea.Extended_Description: A refreshing iced tea infused with sweet blueberries and a hint of cool mint, creating a vibrant, fruity drink with a crisp and revitalizing finish.

Salted caramel (Iced).description: Creamy iced drink with sweet caramel and a touch of salt.
Salted caramel (Iced).Extended_Description: A creamy iced beverage infused with rich caramel and a hint of salt, creating a perfectly balanced flavor that’s both sweet and slightly savory with a smooth finish.

Strawberry milkshake.description: A rich and creamy blend of strawberries and milk.
Strawberry milkshake.Extended_Description: A rich and creamy milkshake made with sweet, ripe strawberries blended with smooth milk, delivering a luscious, fruity flavor in every sip.

Matcha lattle (Iced).description: Smooth matcha blended with milk and served over ice.
Matcha lattle (Iced).Extended_Description: Smooth, premium matcha blended with creamy milk and served over ice, offering a refreshing drink with a gentle earthy flavor and a naturally calming finish.

Cinnamon Roll.description: A soft, sweet pastry rolled with cinnamon sugar and topped with icing.
Cinnamon Roll.Extended_Description: A soft, fluffy pastry layered with cinnamon sugar and topped with sweet, creamy icing. Warm, aromatic, and perfectly balanced with buttery richness in every bite.

Bagel.description: A dense, chewy bread with a slightly crispy crust, usually shaped like a ring.
Bagel.Extended_Description: A dense and chewy bread with a lightly crisp crust, known for its satisfying texture. Versatile and filling, perfect with both sweet and savory toppings.

Garlic Bread.description: Toasted bread flavored with garlic and butter, often served as a side dish.
Garlic Bread.Extended_Description: Crispy toasted bread infused with rich butter and garlic. Savory and aromatic, with a golden crust and soft center that makes it a perfect side or snack.

Honey Buttered Toast.description: Toasted bread spread with a sweet mixture of honey and butter.
Honey Buttered Toast.Extended_Description: Golden toasted bread spread with a smooth blend of butter and honey. Sweet, rich, and slightly crisp, offering a simple yet comforting treat.

Baguette.description: A long, thin loaf of French bread with a crispy crust and soft interior.
Baguette.Extended_Description: A classic French bread with a crisp, golden crust and a light, airy interior. Mild in flavor and highly versatile, ideal for sandwiches or pairing with spreads.

Muffins.description: Soft, small baked goods that can be sweet or savory, often with added flavors like chocolate or fruits.
Muffins.Extended_Description: Soft and moist baked treats with a fluffy texture, often enhanced with fruits, chocolate, or nuts. Light yet satisfying, perfect for breakfast or a quick snack.

Vegetables Salad.description: a nutritious mix of fresh or cooked vegetables with dressing, packed with vitamins and balanced flavors.
Vegetables Salad.Extended_Description: A versatile and nutritious dish made from fresh, raw, steamed, or roasted vegetables, usually tossed in vinaigrette or creamy dressing. It often includes lettuce, cucumber, tomatoes, onions, and bell peppers, with additions like carrots, chickpeas, eggs, or cheese. It is rich in vitamins, fiber, and minerals that support overall health and daily energy.

Tuna Sandwich.description: creamy and crunchy tuna filling in bread with a light seafood taste.
Tuna Sandwich.Extended_Description: A classic tuna sandwich consists of canned tuna mixed with mayonnaise, celery, and onion, creating a creamy, crunchy filling served between slices of bread that'll surely bring the taste of the sea.

Ham n Cheese Sandwich.description: simple, versatile combo of savory ham and cheese in bread.
Ham n Cheese Sandwich.Extended_Description: classic, versatile meal featuring savory cured ham and melted or cold cheese layered between bread delicately produced for your meat cravings.

Fish n Chips.description: crispy fried fish with a salty, classic British flavor.
Fish n Chips.Extended_Description: classic British dish consisting of white fish—typically cod or haddock—dipped in a savory batter and deep-fried until golden skillfully tailored for your salty taste.

Baked potato.description: crispy outside, soft and fluffy inside, mildly sweet and comforting.
Baked potato.Extended_Description: a whole, large potato cooked in an oven until the skin is crisp and seasoned, while the interior becomes fluffy, soft, and steaming white a perfect balance of sweetness and dough like texture.

Strawberry short cake.description: Soft layered sponge cake with cream and fresh strawberries for a light dessert experience
Strawberry short cake.Extended_Description: A delightful blend of soft, fluffy cake layered with smooth cream and fresh strawberries, offering a light, sweet flavor with a hint of fruity freshness—perfect for a satisfying treat.

Salted Ice Cream.description: Creamy ice cream enhanced with a light salt balance for deeper flavor.
Salted Ice Cream.Extended_Description: A rich and creamy frozen dessert with smooth vanilla flavor and a subtle hint of salt, delivering a balanced sweet and savory taste with a velvety texture.

Tarts.description: Buttery tart shell with smooth custard and fresh fruit topping finished with glaze.
Tarts.Extended_Description: A crisp buttery crust filled with silky custard and topped with fresh fruits, creating a balance of sweet and slightly tangy flavors—perfect for a light and elegant dessert.

Pudding.description: Classic silky caramel custard dessert with smooth texture.
Pudding.Extended_Description: A smooth and creamy custard topped with a rich, golden caramel glaze, offering a melt-in-your-mouth texture with perfectly balanced sweetness.

Waffles.description: Crispy golden waffles served warm with syrup and butter.
Waffles.Extended_Description: Golden, crisp waffles with a soft fluffy center, drizzled with rich maple syrup and topped with melting butter for a warm and comforting bite.
